carta_contemplada.prompt: Professional advertising creative, vertical format 1080x1350. Warm amber-to-dark-green gradient background transitioning from top-left warm gold to bottom-right deep emerald green. On the left side, a confident Brazilian businessman in his 40s wearing a dark premium suit, arms crossed, slight confident smile, looking directly at camera. He is holding a golden key in his right hand. Professional studio lighting with warm rim light. On the right side, clean open space for text overlay. At the top, small elegant logo area. Premium financial services aesthetic, sharp photography, warm skin tones. The mood conveys trust, authority, and financial success. No text, no watermarks, no UI elements.

carta_contemplada.name: Comparativo Banco vs Titanium

carta_contemplada.prompt: Professional split-screen advertising creative, square format 1080x1080. Left half: cold blue-gray tinted corporate bank building interior, harsh fluorescent lighting, sterile atmosphere, feeling of bureaucracy and coldness. A subtle red downward arrow overlay suggesting loss. Right half: warm golden-green tinted modern home interior, inviting warm lighting, a family silhouette visible in the warm glow, feeling of achievement and warmth. A subtle green upward arrow overlay suggesting growth. The division line between the halves is a bold diagonal line in emerald green with gold edge. High contrast between the cold and warm sides. Professional advertising photography, cinematic quality. No text, no watermarks.

carta_comum.name: Dor do Aluguel — Dinheiro Que Não Volta
carta_comum.prompt: Professional advertising creative, square format 1080x1080. Dark moody background with warm amber accent lighting. A stylized visualization of a calendar or clock with pages/hands dissolving into golden particles that float away — representing time and money being lost. The calendar pages are illuminated with warm light as they disintegrate. The mood is urgency, awareness that time equals money lost on rent. Conceptual advertising photography with 3D elements, dark premium atmosphere, cinematic warm lighting against dark background. No text, no watermarks.

copy_overlay.headline:
EM 5 ANOS DE ALUGUEL
VOCÊ JOGOU FORA
R$90.000.

de patrimônio que ficou com outro.

Com R$399/mês de consórcio,
em 5 anos você já teria crédito
para comprar À VISTA.
copy_overlay.destaque:

O consórcio constrói o SEU patrimônio.

Futuristic fintech aesthetic, glass morphism effects, subtle green and gold glow. The mood is clarity, smart decision-making, financial intelligence. 3D render quality. No text on the phone screen, no watermarks.

Bottom half: warm golden color grading, the same concept but a happy, confident man sitting in a brand new car interior with modern dashboard, warm sunlight streaming through the windshield, satisfied smile, feeling of freedom and achievement. No text, no watermarks.

meta_ads: ✅ Nenhum criativo usa 'sem juros' isolado — sempre 'sem juros abusivos de financiamento'
✅ Nenhuma promessa de aprovação garantida — usa 'aprovação facilitada'
✅ Nenhuma foto de dinheiro/cédulas — usa ícones e representações abstratas
✅ Nenhum antes/depois financeiro direto — usa comparativos educacionais
✅ Menção a regulamentação do Banco Central (verdadeiro)
✅ Sem promessa de contemplação em prazo específico
google_ads: ✅ Headlines dentro do limite de 30 caracteres
✅ Descrições dentro do limite de 90 caracteres
✅ Compliance com política de serviços financeiros Google
